lines.en: Hello, I would like to get a haircut, please.
Sure, please sit down. How would you like it cut?
Just a little shorter on the sides, please. Not too short.
lines.zh: 两边稍微剪短一点就好。不要剪太短。

lines.en: No problem. Do you want me to wash your hair first?
lines.zh: 没问题。要我先帮您洗个头吗？

lines.en: Yes, please. And can you use the shampoo that smells like oranges?
lines.zh: 好的。能用那个橙子味的洗发水吗？

lines.en: Of course. Are you happy with the length in the front?
lines.zh: 当然可以。前面的长度您满意吗？

lines.en: Please trim the bangs a little bit. They are getting into my eyes.
lines.zh: 请把刘海稍微修一下。有点扎眼睛了。

lines.en: All done. How does it look?
It looks great! Thank you so much.
lines.zh: 看起来棒极了！非常感谢。
